programs.title: Life Below Zero: The Thaw
programs.desc: Alaskans are preparing for a thaw.Snow-covered peaks turn into obstacle courses.Hikers encounter rushing streams and hungry predators and swarms of insects.

programs.title: Surgeons: A Matter Of Life Or Death
programs.desc: More stories of life-saving operations in one of the largest hospitals in Great Britain.The series shows up close the activities and work of surgeons with extraordinary skills.

programs.title: Michael Mosley: The Secrets Of Your Big Shop
programs.desc: The leader looks for the sources of health ailments.Analyzes the average person's diets and shopping lists.He discovers that the causes of problems can be much closer than we think.

programs.title: Treasures Decoded
programs.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.

programs.title: Life Below Zero
programs.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive a long and dangerous winter.
